security.csp: default-src 'self' tauri: ipc: https://open.spotify.com https://accounts.spotify.com https://*.scdn.co; connect-src 'self' https://accounts.spotify.com https://api.spotify.com https://*.scdn.co; img-src 'self' data: https://*.scdn.co https://i.scdn.co https://mosaic.scdn.co https://lineup-images.scdn.co https://seeded-session-images.scdn.co https://charts-images.scdn.co; media-src https://*.scdn.co https://*.spotify.com; frame-src https://open.spotify.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval';

bundle.longDescription: Lorica is a next-generation IDE built with Tauri 2 and Rust. Features include integrated Git, AI Copilot, encrypted secret vault, multi-language debugging, and a futuristic glassmorphism UI.
